zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Webber於1593年2月13日出生在英國英格蘭戴文可雷迪頓時，他的父親John Brittan Webber25歲，母親Elizabeth Davie22歲。他於1626年8月14日與Tomazin Carpenter在英國戴文易爾辛頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1647年10月19日在英國戴文可雷迪頓享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: Webber
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webber, an agent derivative of Webb .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Webb
meanings: English: occupational name for a weaver, from early Middle English webbe (Old English webba (masculine) or webbe (feminine), probably used of both male and female weavers). This word survived into Middle English long enough to give rise to the surname, but was already obsolescent as an agent noun; hence the secondary forms with the agent suffixes -er and -ster (see Webster , Webber and compare Weaver ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, cognates of 1, including Weber and Weberman.
History: Richard Webb, a Lowland Scot, was an admitted freeman of Boston in 1632, and in 1635 was one of the first settlers of Hartford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Webber was born on 13 February 1593, in Crediton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Brittan Webber, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Davie, was 22. He married Tomazin Carpenter on 14 August 1626, in Ilsington, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 19 October 1647, in Crediton, Devon, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Webber est né le 13 février 1593, à Crediton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Brittan Webber, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Davie, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Tomazin Carpenter le 14 août 1626, à Ilsington, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 octobre 1647, à Crediton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.Plymouth St Andrew, Plymouth, Devon, Eng: Plymouth St Andrew, Plymouth, Devon, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Webber am 13. Februar 1593 in Crediton, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Brittan Webber 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Davie 22. Er hat am 14. August 1626 in Ilsington, Devon, England Tomazin Carpenter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Oktober 1647 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Crediton, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Webber è nato il il 13 febbraio 1593 nel Crediton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Brittan Webber, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Davie, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Tomazin Carpenter il 14 agosto 1626, nel Ilsington, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 19 ottobre 1647, nel Crediton, Devon, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ko.Plymouth St Andrew, Plymouth, Devon, Eng: 영국 데폰 플림우스 플림우스 스트 앤드루
ko.lifeSummary: Edward Webber(이)가 1593년 2월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 크레딧에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Brittan Webber(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Davie(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1626년 8월 14일 영국 데폰 이징턴에서 Tomazin Carpenter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1647년 10월 19일 영국 데폰 크레딧에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Webber nasceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1593, em Crediton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Brittan Webber, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Davie, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Tomazin Carpenter em 14 de agosto de 1626, em Ilsington, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. ru.Plymouth St Andrew, Plymouth, Devon, Eng: плимоут ст андрю, плимоут, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Webber родился 13 февраля 1593 г. в местности кредитон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Brittan Webber было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Davie, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Tomazin Carpenter 14 августа 1626 г. в местности илсингтон, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 19 октября 1647 г. в местности кредитон, девон, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.

Se casó con Tomazin Carpenter el 14 de agosto de 1626, en Ilsington, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas.
